## What You Will Learn

In production ML, you train once and serve predictions many times. Persisting models to disk is the bridge between the training environment and the real world.

### Key Concepts
- **joblib**: The recommended library for saving sklearn models. More efficient than pickle for large numpy arrays.
- **Serialization**: Converting an in-memory Python object into a byte stream that can be saved to disk.
- **Deserialization**: Loading the saved byte stream back into a Python object.
- **Model Deployment**: The saved model file can be loaded by a web API, batch processing job, or mobile app to make predictions.

### Why This Matters
Training a model on your laptop is only half the job. You need to deploy it so other systems can use it. joblib makes this seamless.
